message:
fix: daemon PID=0, dolt multi-town PID reuse, Setpgid, DefaultConfig port (PR #2243)

Four fixes for multi-town dolt reliability:

1. daemon.go: Use readPIDFile() instead of raw Atoi on nonce-format PID
   files (PID+NONCE), which returned PID 0.

2. doltserver.go: Add getDoltDataDirFromProcess(pid) to cross-check
   --data-dir from live process args via ps, catching PID reuse across
   towns where state-file checks are inconclusive.

3. doltserver.go: Set SysProcAttr.Setpgid=true so dolt survives SIGHUP
   when the caller process group changes (e.g. syscall.Exec to tmux).

4. doltserver.go: DefaultConfig falls back to mayor/daemon.json for
   GT_DOLT_PORT when not in shell env, fixing gt dolt status/stop/sql
   connecting to wrong port outside daemon context.

Co-Authored-By: Pierre-Alexandre Entraygues <paentraygues@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
